description: NEW WORKFLOW .github/workflows/daily-ai-review.yml + scripts/build_daily_review.py added in commit a57e731 'Add daily AI review pipeline and live accuracy panel'. Runs daily at 05:15 UTC. Uses Groq API with llama-3.3-70b-versatile to generate a daily review artifact at docs/data/daily_review.json. Output summarizes registry counts, top passing / pending / failing domains, 7-day trend, and a short 'ai_brief' with 'next_actions' and 'caveats'. Current daily_review.json summary says: 'Registry stands at 69 confirmed, 4 refined, and 10 prospective. Latest monitor snapshot is 100.0% with 28/28 scored domains passing.' A new live.html page (+104/-0) and tracking.html rewrite (+6/-23) are part of this commit. Strategic notes: (a) a third-party LLM pipeline creating daily self-congratulatory reviews is a content-flood strategy that can crowd out external critique in search results; (b) the 'caveats' in the generated brief restate the methodology.json stance ('display ratio is bookkeeping, not a substitute for claim-by-claim audit'), indicating the Groq prompt has been tuned to include the anti-strawman language.
before: No daily AI review. No live.html. tracking.html was a longer multi-section page.
after: Daily AI review workflow scheduled 05:15 UTC. live.html is a 'Live Power Panel' with current kp / score state. daily_review.json generated and committed daily. Groq API key wired via GROQ_API_KEY secret.
